'''Jer'Jo Cam'Co''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] and one of the founding [[Syndic/Legends|syndics]] of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]. He proposed the creation of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force|Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet]] after exploration efforts revealed several resource rich [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. As a result of this, many old records found in the [[Expeditionary Library]] held his name. At least seven Chiss [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] were named for him, as well as two [[Star system/Legends|star systems]],<ref name="FH2" /> including the [[Colonial Station Cam'co system|Colonial Station Cam'co]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] encountered the name several [[Time/Legends|times]] when using the Library to find [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. When he asked [[Wynssa Fel]] who Jer'Jo Cam'Co was, it was [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Hess'irolia'nuruodo]] "[[Core name/Legends|Irolia]]" who explained to him of the Syndic's history.<ref name="FH2" />
